Module 10 - Lesson 2
Let’s Discuss 6 Simple Scenarios:!
1.What If My CPS Equals My AFEV?!
2.What If My CPC Is Higher Than My EPC?!
3.What If I Have A Campaign With A Really High CPC?!
4.What If I Have 2 Advertising Campaigns And One Has A
Higher CPC, Should I Cancel It?!
5.What If My CPS Is Higher Than My AFEV?!
6.What If My LCV Is Not Increasing?
How To Make Decisions Based On Your Metrics:

-- 1 of 7 --

Module 10 - Lesson 2
What If My CPS Equals My AFEV?!
•That Means You’re Not Generating Any Profit When
Acquiring A New Customer, Nor Are You Losing Any
Money When You Acquire A New Customer!
•This Is Perfectly Fine!
•Continuing Running The Particular Campaign
How To Make Decisions Based On Your Metrics:

-- 2 of 7 --

Module 10 - Lesson 2
What If My CPC Is Higher Than My 	EPC?!
•That Means You’re Paying More To Generate A Click Than
What That Click Is Worth To You!
•The More Clicks You Get On This Campaign The More
Money You Are Losing!
•You Need To: (1) Optimize The Ad Campaign To Decrease
Click Costs, And/Or (2) You Need To Increase Your Overall
Sales Conversion Rate, And/Or (3) You Need To Increase
Average Front-End Transaction Value
How To Make Decisions Based On Your Metrics:

-- 3 of 7 --

Module 10 - Lesson 2
What If I Have A Campaign With A Really High CPC?!
•High Cost-Per-Click Is All Relative. There Really Is No
Such Thing As High Cost-Per-Click!
•You Need To Look At Cost-Per-Click Along With Earnings-
Per-Click To Determine How High You Can Go!
•For Example: You Could Have A Cost-Per-Click Of $15.
But, If Your Earnings-Per-Click Are $15, You Are At Break-
Even And That’s Fine
How To Make Decisions Based On Your Metrics:

-- 4 of 7 --

Module 10 - Lesson 2
What If I Have 2 Advertising Campaigns And One
Has A Higher CPC, Should I Cancel It?!
•Higher Cost-Per-Click Is Not Necessarily A Bad Thing!
•If Both Campaigns Are Allowing You To Break-Even, Do
Not Cancel Either One!
•Always Keep Cost-Per-Click Within Context. It Needs To
Be Viewed Along With Earnings-Per-Click To Mean
Anything
How To Make Decisions Based On Your Metrics:

-- 5 of 7 --

Module 10 - Lesson 2
What If My CPS Is Higher Than My AFEV?!
•That Means You’re Paying More To Generate A New Customer Than
What That Customer Is Spending With You On Their First Transaction!
•You Need To: (1) Optimize The Ad Campaign To Decrease Costs, And/
Or (2) You Need To Increase Your Overall Sales Conversion Rate, And/
Or (3) You Need To Increase Average Front-End Transaction Value!
•*Once Your Business Matures And You Have The Cash Flow, Going
Negative On The Front-End Will Help Your Business Grow Faster…
As Long As You Have A Nice Backend
How To Make Decisions Based On Your Metrics:

-- 6 of 7 --

Module 10 - Lesson 2
What If My LCV Is Not Increasing?!
•That Means You’re Not Growing The Value Of A Customer
In Your Business!
•This Is An Indication That You’re Not Making Enough New
Offers Frequently Enough To Existing Customers!
•You Need To Become More Prolific With Your Backend
Product And Offer Creation
How To Make Decisions Based On Your Metrics:

-- 7 of 7 --
